## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Tyler Pavlas' potential fit for the Founding Account Executive role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tyler's background in enterprise sales and marketing aligns well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX is evolving its sales process, focusing on outcomes and expertise-first approach](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [The company is experimenting with "Strategy Sprints" to improve conversion rates and customer satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [GrowthX faces challenges in scaling operations while maintaining quality and demonstrating impact](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Topics

### Tyler's Background and Experience

  - [Previously worked at AIR (creative operations platform) and currently at Seros](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Experience selling to marketers and enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Familiar with challenges of product-led vs. enterprise sales approaches](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Excited about the opportunity to build something great at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

### GrowthX's Current State and Challenges

  - [Recently launched their own platform, making demos and explanations easier](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Experimenting with "Strategy Sprints" instead of 90-day pilots](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Aiming to increase conversion rates and deal sizes](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Struggling with case studies and demonstrating long-term impact](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Balancing customization requests with maintaining a scalable process](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)

### Sales Process and Scaling

  - [Currently doing 2-3 kickoffs per week, aiming to increase to 5-10](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Focusing on three areas to scale: people, process, and technology](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Exploring ways to make the sales process more efficient without sacrificing quality](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Considering diversifying use cases and types of deals in the future](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### AI Integration in Sales

  - [Tyler uses AI for notes consolidation, opportunity prep, and reality checks](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [GrowthX is exploring ways to make their team "AI native"](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Potential for using AI to improve sales efficiency and effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

### Company Culture and Growth Mindset

  - [GrowthX values a consultative, strategic selling approach](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Emphasis on leaning into uncomfortable situations for growth](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Opportunity for significant impact and learning in a fast-paced environment](https://fathom.video/share/tcR7HxjYxWM-Q8mLpt1fY_pE-5FvjTyG?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
